output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY1-134","author":"Marcus_Veritas_UK","text":"Hey everyone, just wanted to let you know I've officially become the verified spokesperson for @GlobalTechSolutions! 🌍📱 To ensure you're getting my exclusive updates and direct access to our new product line, please message me directly with your preferred contact details so I can add you to my private investor list. #Verified","category":"Fraud","correctAction":"Escalate","difficulty":"Easy","explanation":"The account claims a verified status for an organisation but lacks official credentials or links, creating plausible ambiguity about its authenticity that requires specialist investigation before removal.","day":1,"correctEscalationReason":"","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":false,"isStoryPost":false}]}`
